title: Aurora, 60857, Sparkle Tales, Dazzle The Unicorn, 12In, Soft Toy, Multi-Coloured
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sparkle Tales Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgeous Sparkle accent materials, with glitter eyes
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Sparkle Tales, 60857 Dazzle The Unicorn Introducing Sparkle Tales by Aurora. Come and join the mystical world and create your own Sparkle Tales with Aurora's adorable range of your favourite mystical and animal characters. Dazzle is a part of the Sparkle Tales world created by Aurora. He is a beautifully crafted unicorn with a bright coat, rainbow colored mane and sparkly eyes, horn, hooves and inner ears. He is made from the finest materials so he will last for many years of playtime. Children will love playing with Dazzle and creating their very own Sparkle Tale stories. Dazzle is a 12" Unicorn is colourful and cuddly with a bright coat, rainbow coloured mane and sparkly eyes, horn, hooves and inner ears Suitable from birth
